ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择除你以外的两名玩家。每局游戏限一次*，你可以得知你选择过的玩家共有几种角色类型，之后你不再因自身能力被唤醒。
firstNightReminder: The hoarder points to a player. Mark them with the corresponding reminder token.
otherNightReminder: The hoarder points to a player. Mark them with the corresponding reminder token if it's not already placed. They then nod or shake their head. If yes, show them a hand signal corresponding to how many character types have the "Mine" reminder token.
